title: CreatorCraft
description: This is the official modpack for CreatorCraft, used for the corresponding server, as well as any shenanigans users wish to have with the additions the modpack offer to spice up the game.
body:
![CreatorCraft](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/389881021346349058/1179438880848629860/CreatorCraftLogo.png?ex=6579c90e&is=6567540e&hm=175a0c8db3fb9ba4049d4d59fbb39461892f769a886e6ed67181edb931d59035&)

**Used for the corresponding server, as well as any shenanigans users wish to have with the additions the modpack offer to spice up the game.**

This modpack uses mods to improve the performance of Minecraft making it a smooth experience for all, as well as expanding the game with more content for exploring, tinkering, building and much more!. It's use of mods and resourcepacks allow for more customization and personalization.

Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/JjtqBjNYCH), or visit the [Website](https://modded-server-creatorcraft.on.drv.tw/AdHub/MC/), for more information on the server!


***This modpack uses assets found outside of Modrinth, links to these assets can be found below.***

<details>
<summary>Outside Assets</summary>

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net)
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Sophisticated Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core)
- [Macaw's Doors](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-doors)
- [Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/macaws-fences-and-walls)
- [ReAuth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reauth)
- [Citadel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel)
- [Embers Rekindled](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-rekindled)
- [Illage and Spillage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage)
- [Monsters & Mushrooms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/monsters-mushrooms)
- [Effective](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective-forge)
- [Celstisynth](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/celestisynth)
- [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
- [Alex's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight)
- [Create: Broken Bad](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad)
- [Create: Usable Broken Bad](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-usable-broken-bad)
- [CIT Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-reforged)

</details>
